title: senecio don-candidus
intro: Senecio don-candidus is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family known as Asteraceae. It is also known as Blue Chalksticks or Blue Fingers, due to its striking blue-gray foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio don-candidus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
